home.title: Enter the KangBa realm
home.subtitle: A dark-fantasy Web3 hub for quests, rewards, and on-chain identity — built for immersion and long-term play.

auth.title: Sign in to KangBa
auth.subtitle: Connect your wallet, use email, or prepare for X login.
auth.walletHint: MetaMask, OKX, Coinbase, Rainbow, and WalletConnect are supported.
auth.emailCodeSent: Check your email (or server logs in dev)
auth.twitterPlaceholder: X / Twitter login is not available yet

engagement.signInRequiredHint: Connect your wallet or verify email to claim rewards and track progress.
engagement.shopSubtitle: Spend points on virtual items and mock NFTs.
engagement.rewardsSubtitle: Sign in daily, complete tasks, and collect virtual loot for future airdrops.
engagement.tasksSubtitle: Earn points and mock NFTs from daily, social, and event quests.

lore.title: Necropolis of KangBa
lore.subtitle: A dying undead civilization — factions, cursed regions, and the prophecy of Final Silence.
lore.timelineSubtitle: From the First Oath to the prophecy of Final Silence.
lore.creaturesSubtitle: Wraiths, leviathans, and fog-spawn that guard taxed souls.

meta.title: KangBa — Dying Undead Civilization
meta.description: Enter a gothic soul economy: soul fragments, cursed relics, necrotic sigils, and Abyssal Echoes. Local-first Web3 engagement.

hero.title: KangBa
hero.subtitle: A dying undead civilization powered by forbidden soul economics — pay the tithe, bind witness souls, claim cursed relics.

lore.title: The continent that died standing
lore.body: KangBa did not fall — it became necropolis. Liches tax memories. Cathedrals sing Abyssal Echoes. Blackveil trades cursed relics.

0.title: Soul Fragments
0.body: Points are taxed memories — the Dominion's currency of the still-breathing dead.

1.title: Cursed Relics
1.body: Mock NFTs manifest as blades, sigils, and echoes — exportable, never minted on-chain in this age.

2.title: Final Silence
2.body: Prophecy claims KangBa ends when every sworn player holds an Abyssal Echo.

factions.title: Swear to a dying throne
factions.subtitle: Three powers divide the corpse of a civilization. Your wallet is your sigil; your streak is your oath.

necropolis.name: Necropolis Dominion
necropolis.desc: Empire of liches who tax soul fragments in marble citadels.

choir.name: Choir of the Hollow King
choir.desc: Cathedral hymns that unmake the living — Morvain's crown of silence.

blackveil.name: Blackveil Covenant
blackveil.desc: Swamp pact-binders who smuggle cursed relics through the fog.

token.title: Forbidden soul economics
token.body: Soul fragments (points) and mock relics are virtual — exportable for future airdrops. No real contracts in this age of stillness.

earn.title: Earn
earn.body: Sign in, tasks, events, and referrals.

spend.title: Spend
spend.body: Redeem the shop for cosmetics and mock NFTs.

airdrop.title: Airdrop-ready
airdrop.body: Admin exports back future on-chain distribution.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.body: Points, mock NFTs, and leaderboard glory.

events.title: Campaigns & fog events
events.body: The Hollow King awakens. Blackveil echoes multiply soul tithes.

p2.body: Events, shop, leaderboards, NFT mock rewards.

p4.body: Real contracts, minting, and token launch.

q1.a: Not yet. All rewards are virtual and exportable for future airdrops.

q2.a: Daily sign-in, tasks, events, referrals, and shop refunds (admin).

q3.a: Off-chain collectible records with rarity — no blockchain minting in this phase.

q4.a: Yes. Share your invite code on the Invite page for bonus points.

footer.tagline: Dark fantasy Web3 hub — built for immersion and long-term play.
footer.legal: © KangBa. Mock experience — not financial advice.

referral.title: Invite allies
referral.subtitle: Share your code. Both you and your ally earn bonus points when they bind.
